fields.name: Indian Creek Trail
fields.description: A scenic paved trail following Indian Creek. Perfect for families and casual riders. Beautiful views of the creek and wildlife.
fields.highlights: Creek views, wildlife spotting, picnic areas, rest stops

fields.name: Oak Ridge Loop
fields.description: A moderate loop through oak forests with some gentle hills. Great for intermediate riders looking for a bit of challenge.
fields.terrain: Mixed gravel and dirt, rolling hills
fields.highlights: Forest canopy, wildflowers in spring, bird watching

fields.name: Summit Challenge Trail
fields.description: A challenging mountain bike trail with steep climbs and technical descents. For experienced riders only.
fields.terrain: Technical singletrack, rocky sections, steep grades
fields.highlights: Panoramic summit views, rock gardens, stream crossings

fields.name: Riverside Park Path
fields.description: An easy, family-friendly path along the river. Great for kids and beginners.

fields.name: Pine Forest
fields.description: A beautiful trail through pine forests with moderate elevation changes.
fields.highlights: Pine forest scenery, deer sightings, peaceful atmosphere

fields.name: Shawnee Mission Park
fields.description: This extensive park features a variety of trails that cater to both hikers and cyclists. The trails here are well-marked and offer beautiful views of the surrounding landscapes, including lakes and fields.
fields.highlights: Lake views, picnic areas, wildlife, fishing piers

fields.name: Meadow Brook
fields.description: Peaceful trail through open meadows and along a gentle brook. Great for nature lovers.
fields.highlights: Wildflower meadows, brook crossings, butterfly watching

fields.name: Coffee Creek
fields.description: Technical ridge-top trail with challenging climbs and fast descents.
fields.highlights: Ridge views, technical sections, fast descents

fields.name: Nall Park
fields.description: Located in a smaller park, this trailhead offers a short loop trail that meanders through wooded areas and open spaces. It’s great for quick outings and nature walks.
fields.highlights: Creek access, shade trees, cool temperatures

fields.name: Black Hoof Park
fields.description: Situated near a scenic lake, this trailhead offers a mix of paved and natural surface trails.
fields.highlights: The area is known for its wildlife and tranquil surroundings, making it perfect for leisurely strolls.

fields.name: Cedar Niles Park
fields.description: Located in a larger natural area, this trailhead offers a network of trails that wind through diverse habitats.
fields.highlights: It’s popular among hikers and mountain bikers looking for a little more adventure.

fields.name: Tomahawk Creek
fields.description: This area showcases trails that run along the river, offering scenic views and opportunities for wildlife spotting. It’s a quieter spot, ideal for nature lovers.
fields.highlights: It’s a great place for birdwatching and enjoying the natural beauty of the region.
